project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
notes: Adds explainable, human-reviewed AI triage suggestions for severity, duplicate likelihood, affected population, and suggested agency routing. Extends incident-service with GET /triage and POST /triage-review endpoints, adds dispatcher-web AI triage panel, shared types, smoke script, docs, and dashboard tracking. Suggestions are decision-support only and never auto-verify, assign, close, or alert. Hardened after adversarial multi-agent review: every suggestion exposure is audit-logged with a suggestionId, reviews reference the exact suggestion the dispatcher saw, overrides record only edited fields, duplicate signals exclude merged/false-report candidates, and the dispatcher UI validates inputs, aborts stale fetches, and never applies an unlogged acceptance.
